allow: PowerShell(docker exec scanops-wazuh bash -c "grep -r 'password' /var/ossec/api/configuration/api.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo '---'; cat /var/ossec/api/configuration/api.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -40")

PowerShell(docker exec scanops-wazuh bash -c "cat /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 'api\\|password\\|auth' | head -30; echo '---USERS---'; ls /var/ossec/api/configuration/ 2>/dev/null")

PowerShell(docker exec scanops-wazuh bash -c "ls /var/ossec/api/configuration/security/; echo '---'; cat /var/ossec/api/configuration/security/user.yml 2>/dev/null || cat /var/ossec/api/configuration/security/users 2>/dev/null || ls /var/ossec/api/configuration/security/")
PowerShell(docker exec scanops-wazuh sqlite3 /var/ossec/api/configuration/security/rbac.db "SELECT username, password FROM users LIMIT 10;")

PowerShell(docker exec scanops-misp su -s /bin/bash www-data -c "/var/www/MISP/app/Console/cake Admin addAuthkey admin@admin.test 2>&1" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec scanops-misp-db mysql -u misp -pmisp misp -e "SELECT id, uuid, authkey_start, authkey_end, user_id FROM auth_keys LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)
